title: ReddishTheBest's Survival Additions | RSA
description: Datapack with a few survival-centered additions. Crafting Table+, Multi-Tool, Diver's Helmet with more to come!
body:
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Q5Q01U8V5S) ## Current Features:
Crafting Table+ - An easy way to carry **8** of the most useful **functional blocks**: - **crafting table** - **furnace** - **smoker** - **blast furnace** - **grindstone** - **smithing table** - **stonecutter** - **anvil** - Swap between blocks by **throwing the item on the ground**; it **transforms upon landing**
Click to open showcase

Click to show recipe

Multi-Tool - Swap items between tools by: - **using the "Swap Item With Off Hand" key**; tools loop - **sneaking** and **looking at a block**; your Multi-Tool will **swap to the appropriate tool by itself** - Treated as a **normal item**; able to be **enchanted**, **renamed**, etc. - **Craft** by **dropping one of each tool** from the **same material** on the **same spot**: - **pickaxe** - **axe** - **shovel** - **hoe**
Click to open showcase

Click to show crafting

Diver's Helmet - When **equipped** and **in water**: - Applies the **Conduit status effect**; effectively granting you an easier time **breathing**, **mining** and **moving** underwater - Additionally sets **150% Water Movement Efficiency**
Click to open showcase

Click to show crafting

## Config - All features in this datapack are **toggleable**!
Click to open showcase
